title: gladiolus atropurpureus
intro: Gladiolus atropurpureus, also known as the black corn lily or black calla lily, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Gladiolus atropurpureus include its potential to help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as fever and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's root and rhizome are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
